comments: File b contains some edits of TV's links from 18 April 1986.
TV mistakenly mentions that the Mötley Crue concert was in Fresno. He also mentions that there is an AC/DC track coming up in the unrecorded portion of the show.

track_listing.track: Show intro, then cuts to silence and straight to Lie Back And Enjoy It

track_listing.details: LP-Living In The Fear Of The Private Eye; Epic; 18 April 1986
